title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's sons undertake a strenuous worship of Goddess Parvati. When she doesn't respond, Lord Shiv and the Goddess engage in a heated argument.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Goddess Parvati manifests before Tarakasura's sons in the eternal beauty of Tripura Sundari avatar, assuring them protection from future adversities in this divine form.

title: Jaganmathe
subTitle: Sakthi is blessed with powers from the Goddess JAGANMATHE. Adored by the villagers for her abilities, she has grown up under the strict watch of her sister, who is her total opposite. Her life takes a turn when she meets an atheist doctor.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki's request for a monthly allowance has put Niranjan in a tight spot. With no job to rely on, Niranjan asks for a favour from his brother. Will Niranjan be able to meet Janaki's needs?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Upon learning that Janaki is feeling alienated from the family, Chanchala confronts Chandu about his indifference towards Janaki. When Chandu realises that his behaviour is affecting the equilibrium of the family, he decides to set things right.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Chandu senses a storm brewing when Rashmi asks for a way to finance the newlyweds' livelihood. He refuses to provide help as Janaki is not his daughter. However, he changes tact upon realising that Janaki is eavesdropping.

title: Ondu Motteya Kathe
subTitle: Ondu Motteya Kathe is a 2017 Kannada language romantic comedy film written and directed by debutant Raj B. Shetty who also appears in the lead role, along with Usha Bhandary, Shailashree,Prakash Tuminadu, Amrutha Naik, Shreya Anchan, Vj Vineeth.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Ranganath accidentally locked his jaw while teasing his wife and is unable to free it himself. Later, Vittal assures Ranganath of a simple surgery to resolve the issue.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Lalli hit a street vendor with her car, causing a severe injury and affecting his business. Later, the vendor arrives at Lalli's residence and requests that a family member work in his place to compensate for his earnings.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Lalithamba is delighted when she finds a magical ring. However, a wise sage suddenly warns her against keeping it.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Swamiji advises Lalli to divorce Vittal and remarry him to advance her political career. Later, Vittal signs the divorce document, and Lalli is shocked as Swamiji refuses to remarry her unless she agrees to all his conditions.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: After losing a sponsored trip to Singapore, Vittal blames the auto driver for his tardiness. However, the auto driver retaliates and challenges Vittal to perform his job for a day.

subTitle: Lalithamba's free medical campaign concludes successfully. However, Vittal's closing speech remark provokes public outrage.

subTitle: Unable to contact Janaki, Sanjana feels helpless and loses all hope of catching Varun Vaibhav. But Janaki arrives on time and learns that Varun Vaibhav has left for the airport with Chandu. Can Janaki stop Varun Vaibhav from fleeing?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya persists in his determination and summons Goddess Parvati to disclose the identity of his father. Expressing his resentment, he condemns his father for abandoning him throughout the years.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati's silence regarding his father's identity leaves Kartikeya disheartened. He resolves to seek answers directly from Lord Shiva.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati, concerned about Kartikeya's decision to engage in battle against Tarakasura's sons, expresses her worry, prompting her to implore Shiva to ensure Kartikeya's safety from the impending danger. Will Lord Shiva come to his son's aid?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva sets Tarakasura's sons and Asura Guru free from captivity, cautioning them about their inevitable downfall in their next confrontation. Will Tarakasura's sons heed this warning seriously?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya transforms into Sadananda with six faces as his mothers attempt to feed him. Meanwhile, Tarakasura's sons conduct a dark ritual, summoning Goddess Parvati.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Hurt by her father's comments, Janaki decides to give up all of her joint shares with Chandu and return it back to him. After discussing it with Niranjan, Janaki decides to inform Chandu about her final decision.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Feeling constrained in her own house, Janaki looks desperately for an outlet and considers moving to Washington with Niranjan. Despite Niranjan's protests, she decides to meet the Chief Minister to request a change in Niranjan's posting.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: After many futile attempts, the CM informs Janaki that Niranjan's file is no where to be found. A disturbed Janaki returns home and confronts Niranjan. Guilt-ridden, he tries his best to justify his lies.

title: Lion Jagapathi Rao
subTitle: Jagapathi Rao, an eminent lawyer, is known for his fierce ethics. Soon, Jagapathi's life turns upside down when a local politician challenges him to contest the election against him.

subTitle: The doctor Vittal faces trouble after Jwala accuses him of raping her. Later, Jwala threatening Lalli's family with a video, but they refuse to accept the allegation.

subTitle: Dr. Vittal experiences a life-changing shock when he is electrocuted and gains magnetic powers. However, Vittal situation turns sideways when an old lady friend falls for his magnetic attraction.

subTitle: Silli ignores NML's hard work and begins to question her loyalty to the family. Later, Silli devises a comprehensive strategy to determine if NML is leaving the family for a high-paying job.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Upon Lalli's disappointed return, Silli determines to uncover the source of her distress. Later, Silli calls Ranganath and discovers that Vishalu is also emotional for some reason.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya's steadfast devotion impresses Lord Shiva, who, feeling content, encourages Kartikeya to seek a boon. Seizing the moment, Kartikeya asks for the truth about his parents.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya is stunned to discover that his father is none other than Lord Shiva himself. Overwhelmed, Kartikeya breaks down, feeling hurt for not being acknowledged as the son of Goddess Parvati and Lord Shiva.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Kartikeya suggests Parvati and Shankar to give an invitation card to all the Gods for Ganpati's Vrat Bandhan ceremony. Parvati, Shankar and all the other Gods like the new idea of invitation cards.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Mahadev takes the form of a child so that Parvati is happy. Ganesha tries bonding with other students at Gurukul but some are jealous of him. Narayan tries to convince Brahma dev to let down the decision of creating a new universe but fails.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Parvati, unaware of who Batuk actually is, feels happy to be with him and his behaviour reminds her of Ganesh. Meanwhile, Narayan realises Batuk's truth and makes fun of him.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Vishnu and Mahadev discuss how Brahmadev is trying to create problems in the universe and decide to stop him. They instruct Chandradev not to follow Brahmadev's orders. Later, when Brahmadev gives orders to Chandradev, he refuses to obey.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Niranjan wakes up in the morning and notices that Janaki is nowhere to be found. Worried, he suspects that the truth about his employment compelled Janaki to leave the house. Can Niranjan and Janaki's family locate her before it's too late?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Unable to find Janaki and with no clue about her whereabouts, Rashmi decides to go behind Chandu's back and give a police complaint.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Rashmi calls CSP and asks him if Janaki visited him. CSP gets emotional when he learns about Janaki's marital problems. He assures Rashmi that he will help her in finding Janaki. Will CSP manage to find Janaki?

title: Geetha Bangle Store
subTitle: Geetha leads a simple life with her mother who makes her living selling bangles. However, after she falls in love with a man, Veera, she realises that she cannot be with him due to their families.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Ranganath has reported the tragic death of Lalli in a plane crash. Later, Ranganath explains that Lalli, who was on her way to China to combat the coronavirus pandemic, tragically passed away.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Dolly, a stranger, arrives at Lalli and requests her to deliver ten lakh rupees to her aunt. Later, Vittal aims to impress Dolly but ends up delivering the money to the wrong address.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal is blaming the auto driver for missing a free Singapore trip due to lateness. Later, the auto driver challenges Vittal to become an auto driver for a day, promising to drive him for free if he wins.

subTitle: Vishwas often fights against the mistreatment of the poor by the wealthy. He discovers his father's murder and seeks vengeance against the perpetrators.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: The Chief Minister grants Janaki's request to appoint CSP as the Special Public Prosecutor for the case. Chandu intends to appoint Swamy as the Public Prosecutor so the case will turn in Varun Vaibhav's favour.

subTitle: Janaki reveals to CSP about their plea to appoint him as a special public prosecutor and requests him to take up the case.
